## Environment

- **Unity version:** (e.g. `2022.3.10f1`)
- **Platform:** (Windows / macOS / Linux / Android / iOS / WebGL / other)
- **Scripting backend:** (Mono / IL2CPP)
- **API compatibility level:** (.NET Standard 2.1 / .NET Framework)

## Cephable setup

- **Are you signed in successfully?** (yes / no)
- **Device Type ID configured?** (yes / no)
- **OAuth redirect URI matches `http://127.0.0.1:51772/`?** (yes / no)
